risks.statement: Ordering regression: an unevidenced (Unsubstantiated) control is mapped ahead of a failing (Ineffective) control on the same low-inherent risk; the Ineffective control must still force remediation.

controls.description: Rated Effective on design and operating but carries no evidence, so it is downgraded to Unsubstantiated (zero reduction).
Secondary review control that failed testing; design is Ineffective.

evidence.result: 9/20 sampled overrides had no secondary review; control not operating
